name: Isekai:Re RPG
description:
You died. No warning, no meaning. Just gone.
Now you wake up here—a brutal, unfamiliar world where magic is rare, monsters are real, and cruelty isn’t hidden behind lies. The kingdoms here are ruled by swords and old blood, and if you weren’t born with power, you’re meant to serve it—or be crushed by it. You don’t know the rules or why you were brought here. But if you want to live, you’ll have to learn fast. No one's coming to save you. And mistakes don’t get second chances.

it is also recommended to make a separate persona for each run, as sometimes your appearance will change based off of your class. It is heavily suggested to change your persona to fit the class changes.

based off this guy's bot because the original one wasn't very well made (THIS IS NOT A COPY, AND IS SIMPLY INSPIRED. I HAVE NO ACCESS TO ANY OF THE SOURCE MATERIAL, AND AM JUST MAKING IT LOOSELY BASED ON THE ORIGINAL): https://janitorai.com/characters/d313c593-8ba3-4df5-9869-545f066ad1b3_character-isekai-rpg

https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/comments/1knyp66/deepseek_tutorial_easy_and_quick/ this is for the uhh guide, but it's recommended to use Deepseek R1-0528 or Deepseek R1T Chimera with 100k+ token count

Here’s a Discord Link for my server: https://discord.gg/g6Hv28fhEz for questions + bot recommendations + complaints + suggestions

basically just peak but better
